query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as unique_players,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as registered_players,
  COUNT(*) as total_puzzles_solved,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isCorrect = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_puzzles,
  MIN(completedAt) as first_activity,
  MAX(completedAt) as last_activity
FROM puzzle_attempts
WHERE completedAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR);
